name: place
description: place — a platform of nine interlocking systems built around a content-heavy commonplace book reference design

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p systems/capability && tsc --noEmit -p systems/data && tsc --noEmit -p systems/persistence && tsc --noEmit -p systems/routing && tsc --noEmit -p systems/search && tsc --noEmit -p systems/security && tsc --noEmit -p systems/component && tsc --noEmit -p systems/design && tsc --noEmit -p systems/devtools && tsc --noEmit -p examples/docs && tsc --noEmit -p tools/create-app && tsc --noEmit -p tools/place
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun examples/docs/probes/forbidden-imports.ts && bun tools/create-app/scripts/check-template-pins.ts && bun scripts/check-publish-readiness.ts
